codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit satisfies the feature description and expected behavior: committed pending cast-tail/server changes, made HeadlessTerminal.cols/rows mutable with resize updates, removed dead terminal_send_scroll seq variable, removed duplicate isBun export from pty.ts, and added resize-focused tests. No blocking correctness or regression issues were found in the reviewed implementation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The impl-worker skill's typecheck instruction is out of sync with project reality and causes avoidable command failures.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: SKILL.md step 7 instructs `bun tsc --noEmit`, but AGENTS.md/services use `bunx tsc --noEmit`; transcript skeleton for session eeca06ce-e4a8-46fc-ba31-a5f9466758eb shows `bun tsc --noEmit` failed with "Script not found \"tsc\"" before fallback.

summary: PASS. Required tech-debt fixes and coverage updates are implemented correctly, with evidence of passing tests and no detected regressions.
